response:
Certainly! Here's a rewritten version of your message without including any personally identifiable information:

---

Subject: Confirmation of Compliance System Training

Dear [Recipient's Name],

Thank you for your response. We have sent you an invitation to attend a compliance system training session. You have two options for the time slot: 6:00 PM or 14:00 (4:00 PM). The training will take place on [Date] at 16:00 – 17:00 (4:00 – 5:00) at Tearms. The session will be conducted in English, and we kindly request your attendance.

Thank you again for your cooperation.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Contact Information]  

---

Let me know if you'd like to adjust the tone or add more details!
